errors.default: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.network: Failed to connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
errors.auth: Invalid session. Please log in again.

home.title: Prepare for your next interview smartly
home.subtitle: Practice with an AI-powered interview simulator and get instant feedback on your performance. Overcome interview anxiety with a realistic experience that mimics top companies.
home.featuresTitle: How do we help you stand out?
home.featuresSubtitle: We use the latest AI technologies to put you in the center of the action and prepare you for all possibilities.
home.f1Desc: Practice with voice with an AI that understands you. Natural voice simulation using generative AI to create a real dialogue.
home.f2Desc: Discover gaps and get training recommendations. We match your resume with the target job requirements.
home.f3Desc: Strengths and weaknesses for each answer. Get an accurate assessment of content, body language, and tone of voice.
home.ctaTitle: Start your journey to your dream job today
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of professionals who trusted "AI Interview Prep" to improve their career opportunities.
home.ctaBtn: Sign up for free and start training

footer.shareText: The best platform to practice personal interviews with AI!

dashboard.subtitle: Track your progress and prepare for your next interview.

history.title: Previous Interviews History
history.empty: You haven't recorded any interviews yet.

actions.title: What do you want to do today?

interview.title: New Interview Simulation
interview.desc: Practice common and industry-specific interview questions with instant smart feedback.

gap.title: Resume Analysis
gap.desc: Discover gaps between your skills and market requirements and get a personalized training plan.

quiz.title: Quick Knowledge Quiz
quiz.desc: Evaluate your level in basic technical interview concepts through quick multiple-choice questions.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Discover the best professionals on our platform based on smart interview ratings. Practice more to reach the top!
leaderboard.footer: This list is updated weekly based on average performance.
leaderboard.empty: No data available in the leaderboard yet.
leaderboard.emptyDesc: Be the first to complete an interview and top the board!

alerts.fillAll: Please fill all fields to generate questions correctly.
alerts.apiError: Failed to connect to AI. Please verify your API key.
alerts.generateError: An error occurred while generating questions. Check your API key in .env.local

start.title: Smart Custom Quiz
start.desc: We generate custom questions for you based on the company, job title, and your specialization to realistically simulate your technical test.

generating.title: Generating questions...
generating.desc: We are customizing questions for the {{job}} role at {{company}}...

result.perfectDesc: You have proven your worth. You are completely ready to apply for {{job}} at {{company}}!
result.practiceDesc: Every question is an opportunity to learn something new in {{spec}}. Don't give up!

setup.title: Interview Setup
setup.typeTechDesc: Deep technical questions and coding challenges to evaluate your skills.
setup.typeBehavDesc: Behavioral questions based on STAR method to measure soft skills.
setup.cvUploadDesc: Upload your CV (PDF) to get personalized questions based on your experience

idle.title: Interview Room Ready
idle.desc1: The AI will interview you for the role of
idle.desc3: Make sure you are in a quiet place and use your microphone.

chat.placeholderNormal: Type your answer here or use the microphone...

finished.title: Interview Finished Successfully!
finished.desc: Your answers have been saved successfully. You can review them or analyze your performance.

interview.startMessage: Hello, I am ready to start the interview for {{company}}. Please ask the first question.

errors.loginRequired: Please login to view this cloud-saved interview.
errors.aiError: An error occurred while generating analysis from AI.

hero.title: Performance Report & Gap Analyzer
hero.desc: Based on your conversation, the AI has extracted your strengths and the gaps that need extra focus.
hero.loginPrompt: Log in to save this report in the cloud and add it permanently to your profile!

score.title: Overall Performance Score
score.desc: Your performance was evaluated based on accuracy and professionalism in answering the interview questions.

tip.title: Quick Tip
tip.desc: Focusing on weaknesses will make you a stronger candidate. Try reviewing the recommended topics before a real interview!

authModal.title: Welcome
authModal.desc: Log in to save your interviews and get smart performance reports.

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: Update your personal information and how you appear to the community.
profile.avatarDesc: Image must be in JPG or PNG format and less than 5MB.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.desc: Choose the type of notifications you want to receive.

items.title: Interview Reminders
items.desc: Receive reminders before scheduled practice sessions.

items.title: Weekly Tips & Guides
items.desc: Latest articles and tips for passing interviews.

items.title: System Updates
items.desc: Notifications about new features and bug fixes.

appearance.title: Appearance Settings
appearance.desc: Customize the application look and select your preferred color mode.
appearance.selectTheme: Choose your preferred color theme for comfortable viewing:

tabSecurity.title: Security & Privacy
tabSecurity.desc: Manage your account security and view current session details.

billing.title: Subscription & Billing
billing.desc: View your current subscription plan and AI credits usage statistics.
billing.usageDesc: You have consumed 5 out of 10 free AI credits available for this month.

underDev.title: This Section is Under Development
underDev.desc: We are working hard to add more settings soon.

atsScanner.title: ATS Resume Scanner
atsScanner.subtitle: Ensure your resume can beat company bots. Upload your file, enter the job description, and AI will provide your match score and tips.
atsScanner.placeholder: Copy and paste job requirements from the job posting here...
atsScanner.errorPdfOnly: Please upload a PDF file only.
atsScanner.errorMissing: Please upload a resume and enter a job description.
atsScanner.errorDefault: An error occurred during resume scanning.
atsScanner.resultsPlaceholderDesc: Upload your resume and job description to begin
